title: Browser Attack Frequency Analysis (SOC Application Logs)
description: Hunting query that performs frequency analysis on browser-based attacks detected via SOC Application Logs. Identifies source IPs exhibiting multiple attack types against monitored applications, prioritizing multi-vector attackers.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and ('Request URL' like '*%3Cscript*' or 'Request URL' like '*UNION SELECT*' or 'Request URL' like '*UNION%20SELECT*' or 'Request URL' like '*javascript:*' or 'Request URL' like '*onerror=*' or 'Request URL' like '*document.cookie*' or 'Request URL' like '*SLEEP*' or 'Request URL' like '*DROP TABLE*' or 'Request URL' like '*coinhive*') | stats count as TotalAttempts, distinctcount('Request URL') as UniquePatterns, earliest(Time) as FirstSeen, latest(Time) as LastSeen by 'Client IP', 'Service Name' | where TotalAttempts >= 3 | sort -TotalAttempts
